inputs.user_input: Draft and send an email to all students reminding them that the Software Testing quiz covering Unit Testing and Black Box Testing is next Monday at 9am. Include what topics to study and how to prepare.

output:
✓ Email approved and sent to students.

SUBJECT: Reminder: Software Testing Quiz - Unit Testing & Black Box Testing

BODY:
Dear Students,

This email serves as a reminder regarding the upcoming quiz for the Software Testing course.

The quiz is scheduled for **next Monday at 9:00 AM**.

It will cover the following topics:
*   **Unit Testing**: Please review the definition, purpose, characteristics, and best practices associated with unit testing. Ensure you understand how to identify and design effective unit tests for individual software components.
*   **Black Box Testing**: Focus on the fundamental principles of black box testing, including its emphasis on evaluating software functionality based solely on inputs, outputs, and specified behavior, without knowledge of internal code structure. Review how to design test cases using black box techniques.

To prepare effectively, I strongly advise you to:
*   Review all relevant lecture slides and notes pertaining to Unit Testing and Black Box Testing.
*   Revisit any assigned readings or practical examples discussed in class.
*   Practice designing test cases for various scenarios, applying the concepts learned for both testing types.

Should you have any urgent questions before the quiz, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Sincerely,

[Lecturer's Name/Title]
Lecturer, Software Testing
Mae Fah Luang University
